rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the main concept (reproducibility analysis) but does not show where the draft drifts from it or propose a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags no uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested (robustness/sensitivity study instead of reproducibility study).
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by overreaching toward clinical/legal deployment guidance.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
